case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A. VS. MARY M GALEANA ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GALEANA, MARY M

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210074338) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALEANA, MARY M $2,370.63 PRINCIPAL, $520.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $254.55 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,145.18, SEE SCANNED DOC
